title: Add JWT authentication (3 sub-issues from PRD)
description: Decompose PRD file docs/test-prd.md into 3 auth sub-issues: (1) User model with password hash field, (2) /login and /register endpoints, (3) auth middleware for route protection. Issues must be filed in topological order with priority labels and test strategy sections.
existing_patterns: src/collections/Users.ts uses Payload auth: true with built-in hash/salt fields
src/auth/auth-service.ts implements PBKDF2 password verification and JWT token generation via JwtService
src/middleware/auth-middleware.ts uses Express-style createAuthMiddleware factory pattern
src/auth/jwt-service.ts provides signAccessToken, signRefreshToken, verify methods
